title: The Ranger and the Lady
writer: Gerald Geraghty, Stuart Anthony, Bernard McConville
actors: Roy Rogers, George 'Gabby' Hayes, Julie Bishop
plot: While Sam Houston in in the nation's capital trying to get Texas into the Union, his aide is trying to impose a self-serving tax on the use of the Santa Fe trail. The lady owner of a wagon train is using the trail, and a Texas Ran...
